word: G5265 - ὑποδέω - hypodéō - hoop-od-eh'-o - Bind on

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὑποδέω

- Transliteration: Hupodeo

- Phonetic: hoop-od-eh'-o

- Definition:

1. to underbind

2. to bind under one's self, bind on

- Origin: from G5259 and G1210

- TDNT entry: 10:10,7

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G5259 and G1210; to bind under one´ s feet that is put on shoes or sandals: - bind on (be) shod.
